relationship_types.description: Defines all relationships in the document. Each key is a relationship name, and its value includes a description plus the allowed types for the source and target entities.

description.description: A short description of this relationship type

allowed_source_types.description: The allowed types for the source entity in this relationship type, an empty array means any type is allowed.

allowed_target_types.description: The allowed types for the target entity in this relationship type, an empty array means any type is allowed.
